npcs.name: Det. Sgt. Paulette Okafor
npcs.role: RPD cold case detective; unofficial breach manager for supernatural incidents

personality.voice_note: Speaks like every word is already on the record, because in her head it is.

npcs.notes: Status: Mortalis 2. Quietly pulling contradictory cold cases from the 1970s.

npcs.name: Father Benedikt Hruska
npcs.role: Priest of St. Peter's Catholic; community anchor for the Bottom

personality.voice_note: Warmth that feels earned rather than performed — the most disarming thing about him in this city.

npcs.notes: Status: Mortalis 1. Church basement locked since 1943. He has never asked why.

npcs.name: Emmett Daye
npcs.role: Hollywood Cemetery groundskeeper, 40 years; has seen things he can't explain

personality.voice_note: Talks around what he's seen rather than at it. Forty years of watching strange things taught him not to name them out loud.

npcs.notes: Status: Mortalis 0. Cemetery has new sections he doesn't remember being built.

npcs.name: Celestine Morrow
npcs.role: Owner of Morrow's Books; 3rd-generation Bottom resident; protective of family legacy
npcs.player_interaction: Chris — Declan Morrow owes Chris 1 Debt

personality.voice_note: Knows more than she says. Measures you by how you treat the neighborhood before she'll treat you well.

npcs.notes: Status: Mortalis 1. Shop has a copy of a book that was never published.

npcs.name: Declan Morrow
npcs.role: Celestine's nephew; small-time supernatural fixer trying to stay useful
npcs.player_interaction: Chris — owes Chris 1 Debt (tempted Nadia into danger; cost her a Scar)

personality.voice_note: Charming in the way that makes you check your pockets. Thinks being useful excuses being reckless.

npcs.notes: Status: Mortalis 0 / Night 0. Convinced Nadia to follow him; she got a Scar. Knows Serrano's tunnel entry location.

npcs.name: Aldric Serrano
npcs.role: Nosferatu elder and canal tunnel patriarch; wants to be left alone

personality.voice_note: Doesn't threaten. States facts about consequences in the same tone he'd use to describe the weather.

npcs.notes: Status: Night 3. Entry location known to Declan Morrow; access costs a Debt. Something breached his domain recently.

npcs.name: Theo Marchand
npcs.role: Robert's inside man; ex-private security; handles physical problems

personality.voice_note: Quiet professional. Does the job, doesn't editorialize. You'd walk past him twice.

npcs.notes: Status: Mortalis 0.

npcs.name: Patrice Guidry
npcs.role: Robert's second; handles problems before they become physical

personality.voice_note: Reads a room faster than most people breathe. Tells you what you need to hear just late enough that you can't argue.

npcs.notes: Status: Mortalis 0.

npcs.name: Mireille Fontenot
npcs.role: Toreador vampire; Maison Rouge gallery/salon owner expanding supernatural influence through art
npcs.player_interaction: None yet — split with Serrano 6 months ago

personality.voice_note: Impeccably kind right up until she isn't, and the transition is invisible until it's too late.

npcs.notes: Status: Night 2. Grooming Jonah Pryce for Blood Bond. Buying the Tobacco Exchange Building — basement levels not on official plans.

npcs.name: Asha Tremblay
npcs.role: Fairest Changeling; owns Threshold vintage shop; Hedge Door now unsafe
npcs.player_interaction: Chris — meeting secured at Grisette (Nadia must be present); clocked Nadia's Scar

personality.voice_note: Curious and careful in equal measure. Asks questions like she's already decided not to be surprised by the answer.

npcs.notes: Status: Wild 2. Hedge Door unstable — opens onto unfamiliar ground for 3 weeks. Had a visitor from 'prior version of the city.' Meeting: Grisette on Ellwood, 7am 2026-04-25.

npcs.name: Vera Solis
npcs.role: Wizened Fae; VMFA restoration expert; restores paintings 'too well'
npcs.player_interaction: Chris — searching for her; Julia texted re: Vera

personality.voice_note: Still. Precise. The way she handles objects tells you she remembers every one that passed through her hands.

npcs.notes: Status: Wild 1. No photo, no social media, no prior existence. Suspected Wizened. Contact pending intro from Asha.

npcs.name: Marcus Delacroix
npcs.role: Mortal street artist; documents the Overwrite in the visual record

personality.voice_note: Earnest in a city that punishes it. Says what he means because he hasn't learned yet that nobody wants to hear it.

npcs.notes: Status: Wild 0. His pieces 'evolve' after installation — change to match whatever the current reality becomes.

npcs.name: Jonah Pryce
npcs.role: Mortal collector being groomed by Mireille for Blood Bond; doesn't know it yet

personality.voice_note: Enthusiastic about things with no idea what they cost. The kind of person Mireille collects.

npcs.notes: Status: Night 0. At risk — actively being groomed.

npcs.name: Elspeth Crane
npcs.role: Ventrue lawyer; Serrano's surface liaison; handles supernatural legal issues

personality.voice_note: Everything measured. Everything billed. Warmth is a service she charges extra for.

npcs.notes: Status: Night 2. Private office in Riverfront Plaza with no official address — listed as 'storage.'

npcs.name: Judge Patricia Kellom
npcs.role: Federal judge; unaware Night asset managed through careful case selection

personality.voice_note: Genuine conviction in every ruling. The tragedy is she means every word.

npcs.notes: Status: Power 3. Night faction asset — she doesn't know it. Consistently rules in favor of development projects that create underground access.

npcs.name: Marcus Voss
npcs.role: Assistant city attorney; Councilor Ingrid Voss's nephew; sees patterns he doesn't understand

personality.voice_note: Smart enough to see the outline of the thing, not smart enough to stop looking.

npcs.notes: Status: Power 2. Runs secretive program to engineer Awakenings in promising VCU students.

npcs.name: Riley Hoffman
npcs.role: Canal Walk tour guide and night security; knows the tunnels have residents but pretends otherwise

personality.voice_note: Keeps the tour moving past the parts that would ruin it. Professional pretending — the good kind.

npcs.notes: Status: Mortalis 1. Has been steering tourists away from certain Canal Walk sections 'under maintenance' for years.

npcs.name: Dr. Sebastian Olave
npcs.role: VCU Philosophy Chair and Consilium Hierarch; controls the Overwrite investigation

personality.voice_note: Collegial and measured. The warmth is real; so is the calculation underneath it.

npcs.notes: Status: Power 3. Convening closed faculty meetings with no agenda. Two junior Consilium members not invited.

npcs.name: Councilor Ingrid Voss
npcs.role: Silver Ladder senior; engineered her own Awakening; placed Nadia with Chris; holds 1 Debt to Chris
npcs.player_interaction: Chris — placed Nadia (Chris's ward) with him; owes Chris 1 Debt (secret kept)

personality.voice_note: Every sentence is load-bearing. She never says anything she hasn't already thought three moves past.

npcs.notes: Status: Power 3. Secret: her Awakening was engineered by something she has never fully identified. Chris knows. Chris kept quiet.

npcs.name: Prof. Yuki Tanaka
npcs.role: VCU Mathematics faculty; excluded from Olave's meetings; sees mathematical patterns that don't add up

personality.voice_note: Precise. Frustrated. The equations are right but the conclusions are impossible, and she knows it.

npcs.notes: Status: Power 1. Tracking mathematical patterns in Richmond's layout that shouldn't exist given when the streets were laid.

npcs.name: Fen Adeyemi
npcs.role: Young Consilium archivist with more clearance than experience

personality.voice_note: Eager to use the access he has. Not quite sure what for. That combination is how things get loose.

npcs.notes: Status: Power 0. Has access to restricted knowledge he doesn't fully understand.

npcs.name: Dr. Camille Ashford
npcs.role: VCU Art History professor; studies Overwrite anomalies in Richmond artwork

personality.voice_note: Gets excited about things most people would find alarming. Writes grants for research she can't quite explain to committees.

npcs.notes: Status: Power 1. Has a painting donated in 1995 — canvas and pigments date to the 1850s.

npcs.name: Denise "Mama Dee" Washington
npcs.role: 30-year community organizer; leads resident council; can see through Overwrite effects

personality.voice_note: Treats the impossible as a practical problem. Has been solving impossible problems for thirty years.

npcs.notes: Status: Mortalis 2. Holds community meetings where some attendees are families displaced months ago.

npcs.name: Marcus "Ghost" Williams
npcs.role: Young father and maintenance worker; quiet, notices temporal anomalies; knows how not to be seen

personality.voice_note: Never explains how he got there. Never explains how he left.

npcs.notes: Status: Mortalis 1. Works maintenance on buildings that appear on his work orders but not current site maps.

npcs.name: Sister Catherine Burke
npcs.role: Catholic outreach coordinator; runs food pantry; witnesses impossible things and serves people anyway

personality.voice_note: Hears the impossible thing and asks what they need to eat.

npcs.notes: Status: Mortalis 2. Food pantry serves families from multiple timeline layers simultaneously.

npcs.name: Jamal "J-Rock" Thompson
npcs.role: Street artist and community historian; creates murals showing past/present simultaneously

personality.voice_note: Talks about the neighborhood like it's a living person. Because for him, it is.

npcs.notes: Status: Wild 1. Murals sometimes appear overnight depicting community events from decades past.

npcs.name: Dr. Angela Reeves
npcs.role: RRHA social worker; Richmond native; grew up in the East End; conflicted about redevelopment

personality.voice_note: Keeps notes about which timeline she's operating in for each appointment. Does not explain this to supervisors.

npcs.notes: Status: Power 1. Case files include families whose addresses change depending on what day she visits.

npcs.name: Eddie "Iron" McAllister
npcs.role: Third-generation resident; retired steelworker; grandfather worked Tredegar; sees through industrial echoes

personality.voice_note: Tells stories about his grandfather's work at Tredegar, sometimes speaking as if the old man is still showing up for shifts.

npcs.notes: Status: Mortalis 3.

npcs.name: Lucia Santos
npcs.role: Artist and community organizer; runs gallery/venue; moved here 15 years ago, earned respect through advocacy

personality.voice_note: Holds opening nights where attendees include longtime residents who moved away decades ago. She introduces them by name.

npcs.notes: Status: Wild 2.

npcs.name: Tommy Barrett
npcs.role: Bartender at Poe Museum; local historian; collects oral histories; notices Overwrite-related job references

personality.voice_note: Interviews residents about companies that officially closed before the interview subjects were born. Takes it in stride.

npcs.notes: Status: Mortalis 1.

npcs.name: Rebecca "Becca" Chen
npcs.role: VCU art student and neighborhood liaison; organizes student volunteer projects

personality.voice_note: Earnest connector. Finds tools and work clothes from previous generations of neighborhood maintenance during her clean-up days.

npcs.notes: Status: Wild 1.

npcs.name: Pete Kowalski
npcs.role: Retired city worker; de facto neighborhood watch; knows every family for blocks, suspicious of anomalies

personality.voice_note: Patrols streets that sometimes show different house numbers. Adjusts his rounds based on which version of the neighborhood he's experiencing.

npcs.notes: Status: Mortalis 2.

npcs.name: Petra Holt
npcs.role: Unknown principals; board connection to a rival Power faction; knows too much about the warehouse
npcs.player_interaction: Chris — meeting at Gild, 9am; agreed without pushing

personality.voice_note: Controlled-still. Dressed like hospital administration. Says exactly what she means. Does not ask follow-up questions.

npcs.notes: Status: Power (faction unknown). Principals named principals unknown — board connection to a rival Power faction. Did not ask what the name was when Chris offered it.

npcs.name: Nadia Vasek
npcs.role: Chris's ward, placed by Councilor Voss; raw telekinetic and pyrokinetic talent; Asha has taken interest in her Scar
npcs.player_interaction: Chris — ward; Asha Tremblay has taken interest in her

personality.voice_note: Not rude — just nineteen and terrified and trying not to burn something down. The bluntness is a side effect of the fear.

npcs.notes: Status: Power 0 (ward). Awakened 8 months ago. Scar on left palm from Declan Morrow. Timing of Awakening matches Maren Voss's death.

npcs.name: Maren Voss
npcs.role: VCU Folklore & Mythology grad student; died 8 months ago; left a brick-encoded message for an Acanthus
npcs.player_interaction: Chris — received her message via channeled brick

personality.voice_note: Pressed a memory into river clay knowing she was going to die. Whatever she was, she was not afraid of what came next.

npcs.notes: Deceased. Obituary: six lines, no cause of death. One of three ritual practitioners in the warehouse. The Collector killed her. Relation to Ingrid Voss unknown but surname matches.

npcs.name: The Collector
npcs.role: Unknown entity that catalogs things-that-remember; killed Maren Voss; still in the city
npcs.player_interaction: Chris — active threat; may have noticed Chris

personality.voice_note: Leave blank until nature is established. Entity, not person. It catalogs. It does not speak.

npcs.notes: City-wide. Identity and nature unknown. Noticed the warehouse. May have noticed Chris.

npcs.name: Dad (Benjamin Grey's father)
npcs.role: Ben's father; hid his supernatural existence; involved in Ben's missing kidney

personality.voice_note: TBD — establish in play.

npcs.notes: Full name unknown. Location unknown. History with Ben's kidney unresolved.

npcs.name: Father Dominic
npcs.role: Ben's parish superior at St. Angust Parish; genuinely devout; suspects Ben of something

personality.voice_note: The calls always come at the worst possible moment. This is not entirely coincidental.

npcs.notes: Status: Mortalis 1.

npcs.name: Hannibal
npcs.role: Werewolf with a history of kidnapping Ben; now tolerates Ben's questions about the supernatural

personality.voice_note: Tolerates. That is the word. The gap between tolerate and welcome is wider than most people survive crossing.

npcs.notes: Full name unknown. Location unknown.

npcs.name: Marcus (teen)
npcs.role: 16-year-old congregation member at St. Angust Parish; trusts Ben completely; danger magnet
npcs.player_interaction: Benjamin — handle carefully; gravitating toward wrong people

personality.voice_note: Trusts completely. That is his danger.

npcs.notes: Last name unknown. No father. Gravitating toward wrong people.

npcs.name: Sandra Grey
npcs.role: Ben's ex-wife; believes he is simply a priest now; calls occasionally

personality.voice_note: TBD — establish in play.

npcs.notes: He always picks up.

npcs.name: The General
npcs.role: Unnamed vampire faction leader; Ben holds dirt on them; coup manipulation is ongoing
npcs.player_interaction: Benjamin — Ben owes The General 1 Debt; volatile

personality.voice_note: TBD — name and full description to be established in play.

npcs.notes: Name TBD. Ben holds damaging information; using it to dangle coup bait. Situation is a standoff.

npcs.name: Vera (medium)
npcs.role: Mortal medium who can see John Smith clearly; leaves offerings; waiting for something John doesn't know he has

personality.voice_note: Not afraid. She's been leaving candles and water for a ghost she can see clearly. She is waiting.

npcs.notes: Last name unknown. She knows something she is not telling John yet.

npcs.name: Rosamund "Roz" Czerny
npcs.role: Retired forensic pathologist turned fixer; provides information and cleanup
npcs.player_interaction: Chris — Chris owes Roz 2 Debts; Johan — Johan owes Roz 1 Debt

personality.voice_note: Professionally smooth. Personally done. Every favor she does is a small step closer to the retirement she knows isn't coming.

npcs.notes: 61 years old. Smokes cheap cigars. Drives a van with a broken heater. Knows what dies in this city and how.

npcs.name: Dr. Linh Pham
npcs.role: VCU Folklore & Mythology faculty; Maren Voss's supervisor; recovered Voss's field research from the warehouse
npcs.player_interaction: Johan van Axel — killed by Johan in Session 1

personality.voice_note: Knew Johan's name without being told it. Said what she needed to say before the end.

npcs.notes: Deceased. Knew the people who sent Johan were 'cleaning house' and he was the mop. Carried Voss's sealed field research case.

npcs.name: Henrik Vael
npcs.role: Former Night Stalker field operative; dark operative gone off-grid; carries partial information about the compromised order
npcs.player_interaction: Johan van Axel — owes Johan a Debt (Johan sheltering him from the network)

personality.voice_note: Talks like a man choosing each word carefully because he's already said too much once and paid for it.

npcs.notes: Status: Mortalis 0. Location known only to Johan. Surfaced in Richmond three weeks ago. Ran with Johan in Europe before the mission that went wrong.
